prompt: Create a luxury cloisonné enamel art plate displayed upright on a black two-prong decorative stand, photographed like a high-end collectible in warm gallery lighting. The plate is an oval vertical portrait plaque with a thin polished gold rim and raised gold wire partitions throughout, filled with glossy translucent enamel. The central subject is an adorable anime-style girl named Nozomu, shown from the chest up, facing forward with a gentle shy smile, pale skin, soft blush, oversized sparkling blue eyes, and long wavy champagne blonde hair with bangs. Her outfit is a dark navy Victorian lolita dress with white lace collar and ruffled lace trim, a pale blue ribbon bow at the neck, and a round gold bell brooch in the center. Use exactly 3 prominent blue bows: one at the neck, one on the right side of her hair, and one decorative bow on the left side of the border. Surround her with an ornate enamel border of white lace-like floral patterns, curling gold filigree, pale blue scrollwork, tiny star motifs, and pink roses; include exactly 3 visible pink roses on the right side border and 1 pink rose on the left side border. The enamel should look handcrafted: raised metallic gold outlines, pearlescent white glaze, transparent glossy layers, subtle uneven artisan texture, and jewel-like highlights. At the bottom, include a small engraved brass nameplate on the stand reading three centered lines: のぞむ, NOZOMU, and “ENAMEL ART PLATE”. Background is softly blurred beige-brown museum display lighting, with the plate casting a soft shadow on the tabletop. Ultra-detailed, elegant, cute, premium artisan craft, no extra text, no watermark.
